name: oat-tools
description: Owen's Applied Thinking — content production commands for VS Code

commands.title: OAT: Promote All Tables in Document

oat.googleOAuthToken.description: Google OAuth access token (Drive + Sheets scopes). Checked after GOOGLE_OAUTH_TOKEN env var.

oat.gasWebAppUrl.description: Deployed Apps Script web app URL for OAT table styling. If blank, formatting is applied directly via Sheets API.
